creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
There exists a bug #252085, which has a patch for a new port editors/codelite-devel with version 14.0.5.20201218. On Github v15.0.0 [1] was released Jan 15, 2021.

Because editors/codelite is outdated and no longer buildable, wouldn't it be better to update this port to version 15.0.0 instead of creating a new 'devel' version?

Just a thought ;)


[1] https://github.com/eranif/codelite/commit/53713d80b98cca07fef5e0f697497613f18adcff
